schemes.name: Agnipath Yojana
schemes.description: A welfare scheme by the Department of Military Affairs, MoD under which rigorous military training will be imparted to the youth aged between 17.5 to 23 years and meeting other educational, physical, and medical criteria, who are aspirational to be a part of the armed forces.

schemes.name: Agri-Clinics And Agri-Business Centres Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.description: A welfare scheme by the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare was launched in 2002. AC&ABC aims at agricultural development, supplementing the efforts of public extension by providing extension and other services to farmers either on a payment basis or free of cost as per the business model.

schemes.name: AlCTE - Distinguished Professional Scheme
schemes.description: AICTE-Distinguished Professionals Scheme has been launched by the All India Council for Technical Education, Ministry of Education to improve the quality of Technical Education in India by utilizing the expertise of Professionals, Emeritus professors & Eminent Personalities to share their knowledge.

schemes.name: Ambedkar Social Innovation and Incubation Mission (ASIIM)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The scheme aims to boost entrepreneurship and innovation among SC students and SC differently-abled youth by providing focused support to translate innovative, technology-oriented business ideas into successful commercial enterprises. It offers equity funding and hand-holding support.

schemes.name: Amended Technology Upgradation Fund
schemes.description: The Ministry of Textiles introduced the Amended Technology Upgradation Fund Scheme (ATUFS). This scheme aims to facilitate investment, employment, productivity, quality and import and export substitution in the textile industry.

schemes.name: Assistance to Training Institutions Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Under the scheme, assistance would be provided to the training institutions under the Ministry of MSME for creation, strengthening and expansion of infrastructure, including setting-up of new branches and centres.

schemes.name: Assistance to Voluntary Organizations Working for Welfare of OBCs
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The "Assistance to Voluntary Organizations Working for Welfare of OBCs" scheme aims to involve the voluntary sector in improving the educational and socio-economic conditions of the target group i.e. OBCs to upgrade skills to enable them to start income-generating activities on their own.
schemes.income_limit: The beneficiary's annual family income should not exceed â¹1,00,000/-..

schemes.name: Buti Foundation Award
schemes.description: The Buti Foundation Award, established in 2007 by the Buti Foundation, New Delhi, is a biennial award recognizing innovative and outstanding research in the field of Plasma Science & Technology. The award aims to honor a Scientist/Engineer under the age of 45 years for their significant contribution

schemes.name: Capacity Building For Service Providers - Entrepreneurship Programme
schemes.description: The scheme "Entrepreneurship Programme" is a Suo-Moto Sub-Scheme of the Ministry of Tourism under the Umbrella Scheme of "Capacity Building for Service Providers". In this scheme financial assistance is provided to the institutes (given below) to conduct entrepreneurship development programs.

schemes.name: Capacity Building For Service Providers - Skill Testing & Certification
schemes.description: The scheme "Skill Testing & Certification" is a Suo-Moto Sub-Category of Programmes under the Umbrella Scheme of "Capacity Building for Service Providers", Ministry of Tourism. In this scheme, financial assistance is provided to conduct Skilling and Re-Skilling Programmes.

schemes.name: Central Assistance For One Time Settlement Of Displaced Families From PoK And Chhamb Under Prime Minister's Development Package
schemes.description: A relief and rehabilitation scheme by the Ministry of Home Affairs provides central assistance to the displaced families from PoK And Chhamb and settled in the state of Jammu & Kashmir. The amount of Central Assistance of Rs. 5,49,692/- per family will be distributed through Direct Benefit Transfer.

schemes.name: Coir Vikas Yojana- Coir Industry Technology Upgradation Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme âCoir Industry Technology Upgradation Scheme (CITUS)â is a component of âCoir Vikas Yojanaâ and the scheme was launched by Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Government of India.

schemes.name: Coir Vikas Yojana-Skill Upgradation and Mahila Coir Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme âSkill Upgradation and Mahila Coir Yojanaâ is a component of âCoir Vikas Yojanaâ and the scheme was launched by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Government of India.

schemes.name: Comprehensive Handicrafts Cluster Development Programme
schemes.description: The Comprehensive Handicrafts Cluster Development Scheme was launched to create a world-class infrastructure that will cater to the business needs of local artisans & SMEs in order to boost production and export.

schemes.name: Craftsmen Training Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.description: The scheme aims to ensure steady flow of skilled workers in different trades for domestic industry and reduce unemployment among educated youth. It provides systematic vocational training through Industrial Training Institutes and National Skill Training Institutes across India.

schemes.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyay Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
schemes.description: DDU-GKY focuses on the rural poor youth and its emphasis on sustainable employment through the prominence and incentives given to post-placement tracking, retention, and career progression. DDU-GKY is designed to provide high-quality skill training opportunities to the rural poor.

schemes.name: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Rural Livelihoods Mission
schemes.description: DAY-NRLM is the flagship program of MoRD for promoting poverty reduction through building strong institutions for the poor, particularly women, and enabling these institutions to access a range of financial services and livelihoods. States are enabled to formulate their poverty reduction plans.

schemes.name: DESW Internship Scheme
schemes.description: The scheme aims to engage Indian Youth as interns to gain firsthand experience and understanding of welfare, healthcare, resettlement, and administrative schemes meant for Ex-Servicemen.

schemes.name: Digital India Internship Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: An opportunity for a student to secure practical work experience under the guidance of a qualified and experienced Supervisor/Mentor in Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) in the form of Digital India Internship Scheme.

schemes.name: Divyangjan Kaushal Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The scheme aims to ensure dignified livelihood opportunities for Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) by providing industry-relevant and customized training specific to each group. The scheme provides skill development in high-growth sectors such as Information Technology, Animation, Visual Effect, etc.

schemes.name: Employees' Pension Scheme
schemes.description: The scheme ensures retirement security for employees covered under the EPF Act, offering monthly pensions, family pensions, and withdrawal benefits. It targets workers in organised sectors, providing financial support post-retirement, during disability, or to dependents after the memberâs death.

schemes.name: Entrepreneurship and Skill Development Programme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The O/o DC-MSME under "Development of MSMEs" vertical has launched the "Entrepreneurship and Skill Development Programme (ESDP)". The Programme is being organized regularly to nurture the talent of youth by enlightening them on various aspects of industrial/business activity required for setting up

schemes.name: Financial Assistance Under The National Fund For Persons With Disabilities
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A scheme by DoEPwDs for providing financial assistance to the Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) in support of various livelihood activities. The objective of these guidelines is to provide a framework to support financial assistance under the Fund for relevant core areas  for empowerment of PwDs.
schemes.income_limit: The Total Annual Income of Family (from all sources) of the applicant must not exceed - â¹ 3.00 Lakh per Annum (if participating in National Events and National IT Challenge);

schemes.name: FutureSkills Prime Incentive Program
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to promote a novel skilling ecosystem in the country, the programme/scheme would incentivize the cost of the eligible course(s) concerned, providing authentic and accredited certifications that are acceptable in the industry.
schemes.income_limit: The incentive program is open to all Indian citizens, regardless of their age, educational qualification, or income level.

schemes.name: ICAR Emeritus Professor
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.description: The ICAR floated the Scheme of Emeritus Professor in order to provide an opportunity to the superannuated teachers/ Scientists of universities, colleges and institutions under ICAR-AU System.

schemes.name: ICAR Emeritus Scientist
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.description: The ICAR Emeritus Scientist Scheme is a structural method of tapping the Brain and skill bank of the outstanding superannuated professionals of NARS by allowing them to complete the work in hand for its fruitful conclusion, and utilize their talent in teaching specialized courses.

schemes.name: India BPO Promotion Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to create employment opportunities and promote investment in the IT/ITeS sector by establishing BPO/ITeS units in smaller cities. Through this scheme, financial support in the form of Viability Gap Funding is provided to eligible companies.

schemes.name: Institutional Support for Development and Marketing of Tribal Products/Produce
schemes.description: The scheme âInstitutional Support for development and Marketing of Tribal Products/Produceâ was introduced in 2014-15 by the Ministry of Tribal Affairs, Government of India.

schemes.name: Jute Resource-Cum-Production Centre
schemes.description: Jute Resource-Cum-Production Centre (JRCPC) will be set up in the local clusters and localities across the country in collaboration with bonafide Agencies who have adequate experience in training and skilling programs and have required training cum-production infrastructure.

schemes.name: LLB Internship Programme
schemes.description: Department of Justice introduced an Internship Programme for young law students. The purpose is to well acquaint law students in the field of research & referencing work, in various specialized areas of justice delivery, such as Tele-Law, Nyaya Bandhu etc.

schemes.name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
schemes.description: An employment scheme by the MoRD, providing provide at least 100 days of guaranteed wage employment in a financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled work. Any Indian citizen above the age of 18 years and residing in a rural area can apply to this scheme.

schemes.name: National Action Plan for Skill Development of Persons with Disabilities
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A dedicated skill development program aimed at providing high-quality vocational training with a focus on PwDs. The objective is to enhance the skills of PwDs by providing quality vocational skill training, enabling them to gain meaningful employment and become contributing members of society.

schemes.name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme-2
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.description:
To promote apprenticeship training in the country, by providing partial stipend support
to the apprentices engaged under the Apprentice Act, 1961, undertaking capacity building of the apprenticeship ecosystem, and providing advocacy assistance to the stakeholders.

schemes.name: National Career Service Centers For SC/STs (erstwhile Coaching-cum-Guidance Centre for SC/STs)
schemes.description: The scheme provides vocational guidance, confidence-building programmes, personality development sessions, practice in typing and shorthand, special coaching for competitive exams, and computer training courses. The applicant must be an educated, unemployed SC/ST jobseeker.
schemes.income_limit: - The family annual income of the applicant should not be more than â¹3,00,000/- per annum.

schemes.name: National Centre for Communication Security (NCCS) Research Associates Scheme
schemes.description: NCCS engages young scholars as Research Associates  to contribute in development of Telecom Security eco system with in India by providing an opportunity to them to work in areas like Telecom Security Standard development, Lab recognition and Security Certification of telecom products.

schemes.name: National Handicrafts Development Programme: Infrastructure And Technology Support: EMPORIA
schemes.description: In the scheme "Infrastructure and Technology Support: EMPORIA" assistance would be provided for the setting up of emporia. These would be set up in commercially viable locations in the implementing agencies' own/rented buildings.

schemes.name: National Handicrafts Development Programme: Infrastructure And Technology Support: URBAN HAAT
schemes.description: The scheme "Infrastructure & Technology Support: URBAN HAAT" is introduced is to set up a permanent marketing infrastructure in towns/ metropolitan cities to provide direct marketing facilities to handicrafts artisans/handloom weavers, enabling them to sell their products to wider target audience.

schemes.name: National Handicrafts Development Programme: Research & Development Scheme
schemes.description: The "NHDP: Research & Development Scheme" is introduced to generate feedback on economic, social, aesthetic, and promotional aspects of various crafts and artisans in the handicraft sector. The surveys and studies are sponsored/conducted to generate suitable inputs for planning purposes.

schemes.name: National Scheme of Apprenticeship Training
schemes.description: The primary goal of this scheme is to bridge the gap in practical experience for fresh Graduate Engineers, Diploma holders, and 10+2 Vocational pass-outs in approximately 10,000 industrial establishments. The apprentices undergo a one-year training period, receiving a monthly stipend.

schemes.name: National Youth Corps
schemes.description: A volunteership scheme by Ministry of Youth Affairs And Sports to tap the potential of the disciplined and dedicated youth In the age group of 18 to 29 years who have the inclination and spirit to engage in nation building exercises, to serve up to two years in Nation Building activities.

schemes.name: Northeast BPO Promotion Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to promote the establishment of BPO and Information Technology Enabled Services units in the North-Eastern region. Through the scheme, financial assistance in the form of Viability Gap Funding is provided to eligible companies.

schemes.name: PM Street Vendorâs AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
schemes.description: PM SVANidhi is a micro-credit scheme launched on 1st June 2020 by the MoHUA to provide handholding support to street vendors. The scheme facilitates a working capital collateral-free loan of â¹10,000, with subsequent loans of â¹20,000 and â¹50,000 with a 7% interest subsidy.

schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme "PM Vishwakarma " by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, is a new scheme that envisages providing end-to-end holistic support to traditional artisans and craftspeople in scaling up their conventional products and services.

schemes.name: PM-Special Training of Geriatric Caregivers
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The scheme aims to train and create a professional cadre of geriatric caregivers to meet the increasing demand for specialized care for senior citizens. It offers skill development and certification in geriatric care job roles to Indian citizens, ensuring professional services for the elderly.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana was launched by the Department of Pharmaceuticals, in November 2008. Under the scheme, dedicated outlets known as Janaushadhi Kendras are opened to make quality generic medicines available to all at affordable prices.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Dakshta Aur Kushalta Sampann Hitgrahi (PM-DAKSH)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The scheme "PM-DAKSH", launched by the Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment (MoSJ&E), aims to empower socially, educationally, and economically marginalized groups like SCs, OBCs, EWS, DNTs, Safai Mitras, and Waste Pickers by enhancing their skills through high-quality training.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyaan
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyaan (PMGDISHA) is a Digital Literacy Scheme by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY), to make six crore persons in rural areas, across States/UTs, are digitally literate, reaching around 40% of rural households.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana - Recognition Of Prior Learning
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.description: A skill development scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship that enables Indian youth with prior learning experience or skills to obtain industry-relevant skill certification.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana - Short Term Training
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.description: A skill development scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship for school/college dropouts/unemployed aged 15-45 at PMKVY Training Centres (TCs).

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana - Special Projects
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.description: A skill development scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship for Marginalized or vulnerable groups which may not meet all the parameters as laid down in the Guidelines of ShortTerm Training (STT) of PMKVY 3.0

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Viksit Bharat Rozgar Yojana: Part A- Support for First-Time Employees
schemes.description: This component of scheme provides an incentive to assist first-timer employees in navigating their learning curve before they become fully productive with completing their financial literacy course over EPO portal. It provides one time incentive of upto â¹15,000/- to assist first timer employees.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Viksit Bharat Rozgar Yojana: Part B- Support to Employers with Focus on Manufacturing Sector
schemes.description: This component is an employer-focused Part of the scheme that supports creation of sustained additional employment in all sectors. It incentivizes employers for 2 years for creation of additional employment. For establishments engaged in manufacturing sector, incentives will be provided for 4 years.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Virasat ka Samvardhan
schemes.description: PM VIKAS is a Central sector scheme that focuses on socio-economic empowerment of six notified minorities in the country through skilling & training, women leadership & empowerment and education. The scheme integrates erstwhile skilling & education schemes of the Ministry of Minority Affairs.

schemes.name: Prime Ministerâs Internship Scheme
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide internship opportunities to one crore youth in top 500 companies in five years. Through this Scheme, youth will gain exposure for 12 months to real-life business environment, across varied professions and employment opportunities.
schemes.income_limit: The candidate family income should not exceed â¹8,00,000/-.

schemes.name: Prime Ministerâs Rural Development Fellows Scheme
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide short term catalytic support to the District Administration in backward districts to improve programme delivery and simultaneously develop a cadre of Development Facilitators. Fellows receive professional experience, structured learning, and a monthly stipend.

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Launched in August 2008, Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP) is a credit-linked subsidy scheme, administered by the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME). PMEGP aims to generate employment opportunities through the establishment of micro-enterprises in
schemes.income_limit: There will be no income ceiling for assistance in setting up projects under PMEGP.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan - Internship Program
schemes.description: The 'Internship Program' as part of the Framework for Implementation of Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Revamped Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) (2022-23 to 2025-26) of the Ministry of Panchayati Raj (MoPR), Government of India (Gol), seeks to engage 'Students'.

schemes.name: Research Associates (RA)
schemes.description: The Research Associates (RAs) of the Department of Biotechnology (DBT) in India are individuals who engage in research work under the DBT-Research Associateship Program in Biotechnology and its was started in 1999.

schemes.name: SAHAKAR MITRA: NCDCâs Scheme on Internship Programme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.description: The programme aims at providing an opportunity to professional graduates to get experience in areas of functioning of NCDC and related aspects of cooperatives.

schemes.name: Scheme for âSkill Development in ESDM for Digital Indiaâ
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to skill 3,28,000 candidates in the ESDM sector. Through this scheme, training and certification benefits are provided to students and unemployed youth.
schemes.income_limit: > **Reservation / Preference:** - 60% seats: General Category - 40% seats: Reserved Categories - SC: 15% - ST: 7.5% - EWS: 17.5% - EWS Criteria: - The applicantâs family income should not exceed â¹2,00,000/- annually.

schemes.name: Scheme for Action Research and Studies on Judicial Reforms
schemes.description: The scheme provides financial assistance for undertaking action research, evaluation studies, monitoring studies, capacity building, publishing reports, and promoting innovative programmes in the areas of Justice Delivery, Legal Research, and Judicial Reforms.

schemes.name: Scheme For Award Of Financial Assistance For Education To The Wards Of Beedi/Cine/IOMC/LSDM Workers â Pre & Post-Matric
schemes.description: A scholarship scheme by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Ministry of Labour and Employment wherein financial assistance for education is provided to the Wards of Beedi/IOMC/LSDM Workers, varying from â¹1,000/- to â¹25,000/- per student per annum. The benefits are transferred through the DBT system.
schemes.income_limit: The total monthly Income of the Workerâs family from all sources should not exceed under:- Beedi Workers - â¹10,000/-;

schemes.name: Scheme for Financial Assistance to select States/UTs for Skill Development in Electronics System Design and Manufacturing (ESDM) sector
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to enhance skill development capacity in the ESDM sector. Through this scheme, financial assistance and industry-relevant training are provided to students and unemployed youth.

schemes.name: Self Employment Scheme For Rehabilitation Of Manual Scavengers
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The Self Employment Scheme for Rehabilitation of Manual Scavengers (SRMS) was introduced in January 2017 by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, to assist the identified manual scavengers and their dependants in rehabilitation in alternative occupations.

schemes.name: Shilp Guru Award
schemes.description: The âShilp Guru Awardâ for master craftspersons was introduced by the Ministry of Textiles to honor legendary master craftspersons of handicrafts whose work and dedication have contributed not only to the preservation but also to the promotion of the rich and diverse craft heritage of the country.

schemes.name: SITARE-Appreciation Grant
schemes.description: SITARE-Appreciation Grant: Residential workshops called as Biotech Innovation Ignition School (BIIS) for undergraduate students are organized to provide hands-on technical training and mentorship for problem identification in 3-4 weeks duration.

schemes.name: Skill Loan Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.description: A Skill loan scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship to provide loan upto Rs. 1,50,000 to student who has secured admission in a course run by Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs), Polytechnics or in a school recognized by Central or State education Boards or in a college affil

schemes.name: SMILE - Comprehensive Rehabilitation For Welfare Of Transgender Persons â Skill Development And Training
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide employment opportunities to the person belonging to transgender person community by providing them market-oriented skills.
schemes.income_limit: - There is no income criterion for selection in the skill development programme.

schemes.name: Solar Energy Corporation of India (SECI) Internship
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
schemes.description: The SECI Internship Policy is designed to provide practical experience to students in the renewable energy sector. The program aims to give interns exposure to SECI's various divisions, helping them understand the renewable energy sector.

schemes.name: Technical Internship Programme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide practical technical experience through live projects. Under this programme, a 6-month internship with a stipend of â¹20,000/- per month is offered to eligible engineering students.

schemes.name: The Inland Waterways Authority of India Internship Scheme
schemes.description: The purpose of this scheme is to provide with Selected Candidatesâ short term exposure to different verticals/ divisions/ units of IWAI as âInternsâ. An intern may be required to work at Head Office or Project Office depending upon the requirement of the Authority.

schemes.name: The Lokpal of India Internship Scheme
schemes.description: The Lokpal of India launched the Internship Scheme for the interns to learn about the implementation of the Lokpal & Lokayuktas Act, the Prevention of Corruption Act, the Central Vigilance Commission Act, & they can contribute towards the effective functioning of the Lokpal of India with fresh ideas

schemes.name: The NSFDC Internship Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: "The NSFDC Internship Scheme 2024" is implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. The internship will expose students to various programs & schemes undertaken by NSFDC, offering them hands-on experience in

schemes.name: Vocational Education and Training Loan Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The Vocational Education and Training Loan Scheme provides financial assistance to youth of the target group to enhance their skills & employability.

schemes.name: Vocational Training in Tribal Areas
schemes.description: The scheme will be implemented for the benefit of the Scheduled Tribes as well as PTGs and can be taken up anywhere in the country but priority will be given to remote tribal areas, areas inhabited by particularly vulnerable tribes, and areas affected by extremist activities.

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-A
schemes.description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates to pursue research in frontier areas of science and engineering, preferably those having a break in career (minimum two years) and not having regular employment, to explore possibility of re-entry into the profession.

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-B
schemes.description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates with break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. Women scientists who wish to apply under this scheme are required to develop their own project/proposals for scientific and technological solutions

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-C
schemes.description: A scheme by MoST for female candidates with a break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. 1-year training is provided in Intellectual Property Rights (IPRs), patent search, know-how, drafting, filing, trademarks, trade secrets, and copyright.
